jarPath.description: Absolute path to the JAR file to add to the project

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the project directory (the folder that contains nbproject/). Omit to auto-detect the first open Ant/NetBeans project.

copyToLib.description: Whether to copy the JAR into the project lib/ folder. Defaults to true. Set to false to register an already-in-project JAR without copying.
